signals.headline: CAVALIERS TAKE 2-0 SERIES LEAD OVER RAPTORS | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
CAVALIERS TAKE 2-0 SERIES LEAD OVER RAPTORS | YES | HIGH confidence**

The Cleveland Cavaliers defeated the Toronto Raptors 115-105 on Monday night (April 21, 2026) to secure a 2-0 advantage in their NBA Eastern Conference first-round series[1]. Donovan Mitchell led with 30 points, James Harden added 28, and Evan Mobley contributed 25 points and eight rebounds[1].
